column1: Try this jacket on and see if it’s _____________for you.

If he (not to come) on time, we (to wait) for him.
If no one (to come) to help, we (to do) the work ourselves.
If you (to put on) your glasses, you (to see) better.

... you ... (to be) very angry if we (not to come)?
How you (to spend) one million dollars if you (to have) it?
If I (to have) more time, I (to read) more
